name: diagram_create
description: Create a diagram image from a text definition (flowchart, sequence, or class)

diagram_type.description: Type of diagram: flowchart, sequence, or class

definition.description: Diagram definition in a simple text syntax. For flowchart: 'A -> B -> C'. For sequence: 'A -> B: message'. For class: 'ClassName: method1, method2'

output_path.description: File path to save the diagram (supports .svg and .png)
